sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n1085" key="a)gwgei=on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀγωγεῖον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n1085.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">pander's house</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:9:48" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.48</biblScope> </bibl> (perh. <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">f.l. for</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἀσωτ-</ref> </xr>).</sense> </entryFree>
